title: MRD Resistance Geometry Contradiction Mining Task Queue v0

tasks.task_title: Mine counterevidence for the MRD trajectory edge
public_deliverables: Completed through mrd-trajectory-contradiction-mining-note-v0: one contradiction note tests MRD trajectory comparability across assay method, specimen, threshold, timing, and cohort context.
Decision: keep measurement trajectory separate from residual biological state and preserve assay-frame split.
Movement ledger records the edge as source-bounded and comparison-provisional.
acceptance_checks: The work uses public sources only and passes python3 tools/validate_public_artifacts.py.
NGS MRD, flow MRD, and single-cell residual-state observations are not treated as interchangeable.
The task records any assay, threshold, specimen, timing, or cohort mismatch that weakens comparison.
The result does not become patient-specific prognosis, monitoring guidance, or treatment guidance.
what_not_to_infer: Do not infer relapse risk from MRD trajectory labels.
Do not rank MRD assays or thresholds.
Do not recommend treatment changes from MRD trajectory evidence.

tasks.task_title: Mine counterevidence for residual biological state
public_deliverables: One source-specific contradiction note or extraction that tests whether resistant transcriptional-state signals are cohort-specific, treatment-specific, or assay-specific.
A decision on whether residual biological state should remain a single axis or split into narrower therapy-exposure or assay-context branches.
A public update to the axis revision if the state axis needs narrowing.
acceptance_checks: The work uses public sources only and passes python3 tools/validate_public_artifacts.py.
Single-cell resistant-state language stays separate from MRD measurement trajectory.
Treatment exposure, sample timing, and response context are preserved.
Pathway and state signals are not converted into target or treatment guidance.
what_not_to_infer: Do not infer clinical actionability from transcriptional-state labels.
Do not treat scRNA-seq findings as routine clinical decision support.

public_deliverables: Completed through clone-state-coupling-contradiction-mining-note-v0: one contradiction note tests whether clone-state coupling is over-broad, causal-sounding, or method-specific.
Decision: keep the coupling edge provisional, source-specific, and split-ready.
Movement ledger records that clone architecture and transcriptional state remain separate.
acceptance_checks: The work uses public sources only and passes python3 tools/validate_public_artifacts.py.
Clone identity, clone architecture, transcriptional state, therapy exposure, and sampling time remain separate.
Correlation is not converted into causality.
Review-level subclone context is not treated as cohort-level measurement without primary-source support.
what_not_to_infer: Do not infer causality from clone-state correlation.
Do not rank genetic versus nongenetic mechanisms.
Do not infer patient-specific resistance biology.

tasks.task_title: Mine counterevidence for tumor microenvironment shelter signals
public_deliverables: One source-specific contradiction note or extraction that tests whether microenvironment interaction signals are source-method artifacts, review-level categories, or primary-study observations.
A decision on whether TME shelter should remain a geometry bucket or split by immune, stromal, or cell-interaction-inference context.
A public update if microenvironment language needs weakening.
acceptance_checks: The work uses public sources only and passes python3 tools/validate_public_artifacts.py.
Cell-interaction inference is not treated as proof of patient-specific mechanism.
Review-level and primary-study evidence are separated.
Microenvironment language is not converted into treatment or target guidance.
what_not_to_infer: Do not infer patient-specific microenvironment biology.
Do not rank immune, stromal, or cell-interaction mechanisms.

tasks.task_title: Mine counterevidence for pathway actionability overread
public_deliverables: One source-specific contradiction note or extraction that tests whether pathway labels are too broad, source-specific, or vulnerable to actionability overread.
A decision on whether metabolic, NF-kB, hypoxia, protein-folding, or mitochondrial-respiration signals should remain separate branches or be folded into residual-state context.
A public update if any pathway language sounds like an intervention, target, supplement, monitoring, or treatment suggestion.
acceptance_checks: The work uses public sources only and passes python3 tools/validate_public_artifacts.py.
Pathway labels remain research-map signals.
Metabolic and NF-kB branches remain non-actionable even after review-level second-source extraction.
No pathway is promoted to clinical actionability.
what_not_to_infer: Do not recommend targeting any pathway.
Do not recommend metabolic interventions or supplements.
Do not infer patient-specific pathway activity.

review_notes: Created as the concrete counterevidence route required by mrd-resistance-geometry-intelligence-audit-packet-v0.
The MRD trajectory and clone-state coupling contradiction tasks are complete for proof-readiness-v0.
Tasks are pull-request-only internal research tasks; no external human outreach is required or scheduled.
Tasks route uncertainty into source extraction and contradiction notes, not clinical advice.
